name: normiculus-reminder-dispatcher
description: Background reminder dispatcher for WhatsApp using wacli and Firebase Realtime Database (read-only).

scripts.start:bg: sh -c 'mkdir -p .runtime logs; if [ -f .runtime/service.pid ]; then pid=$(cat .runtime/service.pid); if kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Already running with PID $pid"; exit 1; else echo "Removing stale PID file ($pid)"; rm -f .runtime/service.pid; fi; fi; ts=$(date +"%d-%m-%Y-%H-%M-%S"); log_file="logs/remindex-$ts.log"; nohup node src/index.js > "$log_file" 2>&1 & pid=$!; echo "$pid" > .runtime/service.pid; echo "$log_file" > .runtime/service.logfile; echo "Started with PID $pid"; echo "Log file: $log_file"'
scripts.stop:bg: sh -c 'if [ -f .runtime/service.pid ]; then pid=$(cat .runtime/service.pid); if kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then kill "$pid" && echo "Stopped PID $pid"; else echo "Process $pid not running (stale PID file)"; fi; rm -f .runtime/service.pid; else echo "No PID file found"; fi'
scripts.status:bg: sh -c 'log_file=""; if [ -f .runtime/service.logfile ]; then log_file=$(cat .runtime/service.logfile); fi; if [ -f .runtime/service.pid ]; then pid=$(cat .runtime/service.pid); if kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Running with PID $pid"; else echo "Not running (stale PID file for PID $pid)"; fi; else echo "Not running"; fi; if [ -n "$log_file" ]; then echo "Log file: $log_file"; fi'
scripts.logs: sh -c 'if [ -f .runtime/service.logfile ]; then log_file=$(cat .runtime/service.logfile); if [ -f "$log_file" ]; then tail -f "$log_file"; exit 0; fi; fi; latest=$(ls -1t logs/remindex-*.log 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); if [ -n "$latest" ]; then tail -f "$latest"; else echo "No log files found in logs/"; exit 1; fi'
